subject: A robed sorceress channels violet-white energy from outstretched hands as a pair of cracked, glowing god-statue heads loom behind her, framed by jagged stone ruins and bright magical lightning
description: A dark-robed female spellcaster stands at lower-center, arms thrown wide, conjuring brilliant violet-white magical energy that arcs upward and outward in jagged bolts. Behind her loom two enormous broken statue heads of god-like figures — one in pale stone with a long beard or headdress and one in darker stone — set among jagged cliffs and ruined architecture. The sky behind crackles with bright magical lightning and white-hot rays of light. The palette is dominated by deep purples, blacks, golden-brown stone, and searing white-yellow magical highlights. The composition is dramatic and vertical, the energy pouring up out of the caster like a spell of unmaking aimed at the statues themselves.
foreground: robed female spellcaster channeling crackling violet and white magical energy with both arms outstretched
background: two colossal broken god statues among jagged stone ruins under a sky split by bright magical lightning
